name: Squid Game Runner 2
description: Squid Game Runner 2 is an intense and fast-paced survival runner game inspired by high-stakes challenge games. Run, dodge, and survive through dangerous levels filled with traps, obstacles, and unexpected twists. Test your reflexes and timing as the difficulty increases with every stage. Unlock new characters, face thrilling mini-game challenges, and prove your skills in a world where one mistake can cost everything. With smooth controls, engaging gameplay, and exciting environments, Squid Game Runner 2 delivers nonstop action for casual and competitive players alike.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play Space Up Arrow X Key Jump Start Game Down Arrow Duck Slide Left Mouse Click Jump Enter Restart Game after Game Over
